form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last on April 1 over 330m at Temora behind Darcy Mac beaten 12 lengths (19.48) in a Grade 5. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 23.42, beating Ivory Nara. Last start finished 4th over 400m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.64) behind Shifty Bulldozer in a Grade 5 on March 27. Has ability and worth including.
